section_anchor: Outpacing the buys that are actually open
brief_summary: Three-bar comparison chart for the same tracker week: GMK CYL OG Extensions (interest check, no group buy yet) at 55 in a focal terracotta bar, versus GMK CYL Masterpiece R2 (group buy closing that week) at 46 and GMK CYL Pandemonium (group buy mid-window) at 33, both in neutral warm-grey bars.
